sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66047" key="meli/sponda" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελίσπονδα</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n66047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink-offerings of honey</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μ. θύειν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.464c</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">672b</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
